_LookupOutput.description: Placeholder output schema for find tool registration.
_LookupOutput.title: _LookupOutput

description:
LLM-visible send input schema — `{tool_id, params}` envelope.

Mirrors :class:`ummaya.primitives.send.SubmitInput` but lives here so the
OpenAI tool_calls schema published to FriendliAI for the ``send`` tool
is the send envelope, NOT the find mode-discriminated union. (Codex
P1 #2 on PR #2480 caught the original copy-paste bug where SUBMIT_TOOL
was declared with ``input_schema=_LookupInput``.)

params.description: Adapter-defined payload. MUST include 'delegation_context' (the value returned by the prior check call) plus any adapter-specific filing fields. Adapter validates against its own Pydantic model at invocation time.
params.title: Params

tool_id.description: Registered send adapter id (e.g. mock_submit_module_hometax_taxreturn). MUST match a tool_id from the system prompt's <check_chain_pattern> 기본 매핑 section.
tool_id.title: Tool Id

title: send
